metadata.significance: Describes Prophet's Night Journey (Miraj), contains verse of prostration

ayahs.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَٱلنَّجْمِ إِذَا هَوَىٰ

translations.en_sahih: By the star when it descends,
translations.en_yusufali: By the Star when it goes down,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Demi bintang semasa ia menjunam, -

translations.en_sahih: Your companion [Muhammad] has not strayed, nor has he erred,
translations.en_yusufali: Your Companion is neither astray nor being misled.
translations.ms_basmeih: Rakan kamu (Nabi Muhammad yang kamu tuduh dengan berbagai tuduhan itu), tidaklah ia menyeleweng (dari jalan yang benar), dan ia pula tidak sesat (dengan kepercayaan yang salah).

translations.en_sahih: Nor does he speak from [his own] inclination.
translations.en_yusufali: Nor does he say (aught) of (his own) Desire.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan ia tidak memperkatakan (sesuatu yang berhubung dengan ugama Islam) menurut kemahuan dan pendapatnya sendiri.

translations.en_sahih: It is not but a revelation revealed,
translations.en_yusufali: It is no less than inspiration sent down to him:
translations.ms_basmeih: Segala yang diperkatakannya itu (sama ada Al-Quran atau hadis) tidak lain hanyalah wahyu yang diwahyukan kepadanya.

translations.en_sahih: Taught to him by one intense in strength -
translations.en_yusufali: He was taught by one Mighty in Power,
translations.ms_basmeih: wahyu itu (disampaikan dan) diajarkan kepadanya oleh (malaikat jibril) yang amat kuat gagah, -

translations.en_sahih: One of soundness. And he rose to [his] true form
translations.en_yusufali: Endued with Wisdom: for he appeared (in stately form);
translations.ms_basmeih: Lagi yang mempunyai kebijaksanaan; kemudian ia memperlihatkan dirinya (kepada Nabi Muhammad) dengan rupanya asal, -

translations.en_sahih: While he was in the higher [part of the] horizon.
translations.en_yusufali: While he was in the highest part of the horizon:
translations.ms_basmeih: Sedang ia berada di arah yang tinggi (di langit);

translations.en_sahih: Then he approached and descended
translations.en_yusufali: Then he approached and came closer,
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian ia mendekatkan dirinya (kepada Nabi Muhammad), lalu ia berjuntai sedikit demi sedikit,

translations.en_sahih: And was at a distance of two bow lengths or nearer.
translations.en_yusufali: And was at a distance of but two bow-lengths or (even) nearer;
translations.ms_basmeih: Sehingga menjadilah jarak (di antaranya dengan Nabi Muhammad) sekadar dua hujung busaran panah, atau lebih dekat lagi;

translations.en_sahih: And he revealed to His Servant what he revealed.
translations.en_yusufali: So did (Allah) convey the inspiration to His Servant- (conveyed) what He (meant) to convey.
translations.ms_basmeih: Lalu Allah wahyukan kepada hambaNya (Muhammad, dengan perantaraan malaikat Jibril) apa yang telah diwahyukanNya.

translations.en_sahih: The heart did not lie [about] what it saw.
translations.en_yusufali: The (Prophet's) (mind and) heart in no way falsified that which he saw.
translations.ms_basmeih: Hati (Nabi Muhammad) tidak mendustakan apa yang dilihatnya.

translations.en_sahih: So will you dispute with him over what he saw?
translations.en_yusufali: Will ye then dispute with him concerning what he saw?
translations.ms_basmeih: Jika demikian, patutkah kamu hendak membantahnya mengenai apa yang telah dilihatnya itu?

translations.en_sahih: And he certainly saw him in another descent
translations.en_yusufali: For indeed he saw him at a second descent,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan demi sesungguhnya! (Nabi Muhammad) telah melihat (malaikat Jibril, dalam bentuk rupanya yang asal) sekali lagi,

translations.en_sahih: At the Lote Tree of the Utmost Boundary -
translations.en_yusufali: Near the Lote-tree beyond which none may pass:
translations.ms_basmeih: Di sisi "Sidratul-Muntaha";

translations.en_sahih: Near it is the Garden of Refuge -
translations.en_yusufali: Near it is the Garden of Abode.
translations.ms_basmeih: Yang di sisinya terletak Syurga "Jannatul-Makwa".

translations.en_sahih: When there covered the Lote Tree that which covered [it].
translations.en_yusufali: Behold, the Lote-tree was shrouded (in mystery unspeakable!)
translations.ms_basmeih: (Nabi Muhammad melihat jibril dalam bentuk rupanya yang asal pada kali ini ialah) semasa " Sidratul Muntaha" itu diliputi oleh makhluk-makhluk dari alam-alam ghaib, yang tidak terhingga.

translations.en_sahih: The sight [of the Prophet] did not swerve, nor did it transgress [its limit].
translations.en_yusufali: (His) sight never swerved, nor did it go wrong!
translations.ms_basmeih: Penglihatan (Nabi Muhammad) tidak berkisar daripada menyaksikan dengan tepat (akan pemandangan yang indah di situ yang diizinkan melihatnya), dan tidak pula melampaui batas.

ayahs.arabic: لَقَدْ رَأَىٰ مِنْ ءَايَـٰتِ رَبِّهِ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰٓ
ayahs.transliteration: Laqad raa min ayati rabbihi alkubra

translations.en_sahih: He certainly saw of the greatest signs of his Lord.
translations.en_yusufali: For truly did he see, of the Signs of his Lord, the Greatest!
translations.ms_basmeih: Demi sesungguhnya, ia telah melihat sebahagian dari sebesar-besar tanda-tanda (yang membuktikan luasnya pemerintahan dan kekuasaan) Tuhannya.

translations.en_sahih: So have you considered al-Lat and al-'Uzza?
translations.en_yusufali: Have ye seen Lat. and 'Uzza,
translations.ms_basmeih: (Setelah kamu - wahai kaum musyrik Makkah - mendengar keterangan yang membuktikan kekuasaan dan keagungan Allah) maka adakah kamu nampak bahawa "Al-Laat" dan "Al-Uzza" -

translations.en_sahih: And Manat, the third - the other one?
translations.en_yusufali: And another, the third (goddess), Manat?
translations.ms_basmeih: Serta "Manaat" yang ketiga, yang bertaraf rendah lagi hina itu (layak disembah dan dianggap sebagai anak-anak perempuan Allah)?

translations.en_sahih: Is the male for you and for Him the female?
translations.en_yusufali: What! for you the male sex, and for Him, the female?
translations.ms_basmeih: Patutkah kamu membahagi untuk diri kamu sendiri anak lelaki (yang kamu sukai), dan untuk Allah anak perempuan (yang kamu benci)?

translations.en_sahih: That, then, is an unjust division.
translations.en_yusufali: Behold, such would be indeed a division most unfair!
translations.ms_basmeih: Pembahagian yang demikian, sudah tentu suatu pembahagian yang tidak adil.

ayahs.arabic: إِنْ هِىَ إِلَّآ أَسْمَآءٌ سَمَّيْتُمُوهَآ أَنتُمْ وَءَابَآؤُكُم مَّآ أَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَا مِن سُلْطَـٰنٍ ۚ إِن يَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا ٱلظَّنَّ وَمَا تَهْوَى ٱلْأَنفُسُ ۖ وَلَقَدْ جَآءَهُم مِّن رَّبِّهِمُ ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ
ayahs.transliteration: In hiya illa asmaon sammaytumooha antum waabaokum ma anzala Allahu biha min sultanin in yattabiAAoona illa alththanna wama tahwa alanfusu walaqad jaahum min rabbihimu alhuda

translations.en_sahih: They are not but [mere] names you have named them - you and your forefathers - for which Allah has sent down no authority. They follow not except assumption and what [their] souls desire, and there has already come to them from their Lord guidance.
translations.en_yusufali: These are nothing but names which ye have devised,- ye and your fathers,- for which Allah has sent down no authority (whatever). They follow nothing but conjecture and what their own souls desire!- Even though there has already come to them Guidance from their Lord!
translations.ms_basmeih: Benda-benda yang kamu sembah itu tidak lain hanyalah nama-nama yang kamu dan datuk nenek kamu menamakannya. Allah sekali-kali menurunkan sebarang bukti yang membenarkannya. Mereka yang berbuat demikian, tidak menurut melainkan sangkaan-sangkaan dan apa yang diingini oleh hawa nafsunya. Padahal demi sesungguhnya telah datang kepada mereka petunjuk dari Tuhan mereka.

translations.en_sahih: Or is there for man whatever he wishes?
translations.en_yusufali: Nay, shall man have (just) anything he hankers after?
translations.ms_basmeih: Adakah manusia tetap akan dapat mencapai segala yang dicita-citakannya? (Tidak!).

translations.en_sahih: Rather, to Allah belongs the Hereafter and the first [life].
translations.en_yusufali: But it is to Allah that the End and the Beginning (of all things) belong.
translations.ms_basmeih: Kerana Allah jualah yang menguasai segala urusan akhirat dan urusan dunia.

ayahs.arabic: ۞ وَكَم مِّن مَّلَكٍ فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ لَا تُغْنِى شَفَـٰعَتُهُمْ شَيْـًٔا إِلَّا مِنۢ بَعْدِ أَن يَأْذَنَ ٱللَّهُ لِمَن يَشَآءُ وَيَرْضَىٰٓ
ayahs.transliteration: Wakam min malakin fee alssamawati la tughnee shafaAAatuhum shayan illa min baAAdi an yathana Allahu liman yashao wayarda

translations.en_sahih: And how many angels there are in the heavens whose intercession will not avail at all except [only] after Allah has permitted [it] to whom He wills and approves.
translations.en_yusufali: How many-so-ever be the angels in the heavens, their intercession will avail nothing except after Allah has given leave for whom He pleases and that he is acceptable to Him.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Golongan yang musyrik mengharapkan pertolongan benda-benda yang mereka sembah itu) padahal berapa banyak malaikat di langit, syafaat mereka tidak dapat mendatangkan sebarang faedah, kecuali sesudah Allah mengizinkan bagi sesiapa yang dikehendakiNya dan diredhaiNya.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ لَيُسَمُّونَ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةَ تَسْمِيَةَ ٱلْأُنثَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna allatheena la yuminoona bialakhirati layusammoona almalaikata tasmiyata alontha

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, those who do not believe in the Hereafter name the angels female names,
translations.en_yusufali: Those who believe not in the Hereafter, name the angels with female names.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang tidak beriman kepada hari akhirat sahajalah, yang tergamak menamakan malaikat itu dengan nama perempuan,

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا لَهُم بِهِۦ مِنْ عِلْمٍ ۖ إِن يَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا ٱلظَّنَّ ۖ وَإِنَّ ٱلظَّنَّ لَا يُغْنِى مِنَ ٱلْحَقِّ شَيْـًٔا
ayahs.transliteration: Wama lahum bihi min AAilmin in yattabiAAoona illa alththanna wainna alththanna la yughnee mina alhaqqi shayan

translations.en_sahih: And they have thereof no knowledge. They follow not except assumption, and indeed, assumption avails not against the truth at all.
translations.en_yusufali: But they have no knowledge therein. They follow nothing but conjecture; and conjecture avails nothing against Truth.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sedang mereka tidak mempunyai sebarang pengetahuan mengenainya. Mereka tidak lain hanyalah mengikut sangkaan semata-mata, padahal sesungguhnya sangkaan itu tidak dapat memenuhi kehendak menentukan sesuatu dari kebenaran (iktiqad).

ayahs.arabic: فَأَعْرِضْ عَن مَّن تَوَلَّىٰ عَن ذِكْرِنَا وَلَمْ يُرِدْ إِلَّا ٱلْحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنْيَا
ayahs.transliteration: FaaAArid AAan man tawalla AAan thikrina walam yurid illa alhayata alddunya

translations.en_sahih: So turn away from whoever turns his back on Our message and desires not except the worldly life.
translations.en_yusufali: Therefore shun those who turn away from Our Message and desire nothing but the life of this world.
translations.ms_basmeih: Oleh itu, janganlah engkau (wahai Muhammad) hiraukan orang yang berpaling dari pengajaran Kami, dan tidak mahu melainkan kehidupan dunia semata-mata.

ayahs.arabic: ذَٰلِكَ مَبْلَغُهُم مِّنَ ٱلْعِلْمِ ۚ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ وَهُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَنِ ٱهْتَدَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Thalika mablaghuhum mina alAAilmi inna rabbaka huwa aAAlamu biman dalla AAan sabeelihi wahuwa aAAlamu bimani ihtada

translations.en_sahih: That is their sum of knowledge. Indeed, your Lord is most knowing of who strays from His way, and He is most knowing of who is guided.
translations.en_yusufali: That is as far as knowledge will reach them. Verily thy Lord knoweth best those who stray from His Path, and He knoweth best those who receive guidance.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Kepentingan dunia) itulah sahaja tujuan terakhir dari pengetahuan yang dicapai oleh mereka. Sesungguhnya Tuhanmu, Dia lah jua yang lebih mengetahui akan orang yang sesat dari jalanNya, dan Dia lah jua yang lebih mengetahui akan orang yang mendapat hidayah petunjuk.

ayahs.arabic: وَلِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ لِيَجْزِىَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَسَـٰٓـُٔوا۟ بِمَا عَمِلُوا۟ وَيَجْزِىَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَحْسَنُوا۟ بِٱلْحُسْنَى
ayahs.transliteration: Walillahi ma fee alssamawati wama fee alardi liyajziya allatheena asaoo bima AAamiloo wayajziya allatheena ahsanoo bialhusna

translations.en_sahih: And to Allah belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth - that He may recompense those who do evil with [the penalty of] what they have done and recompense those who do good with the best [reward] -
translations.en_yusufali: Yea, to Allah belongs all that is in the heavens and on earth: so that He rewards those who do evil, according to their deeds, and He rewards those who do good, with what is best.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Allah jualah yang memiliki segala yang ada di langit dan yang ada di bumi; (diciptakan semuanya itu) untuk membalas orang-orang yang berbuat jahat menurut apa yang mereka lakukan, dan membalas orang-orang yang berbuat baik dengan balasan yang sebaik-baiknya.

ayahs.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يَجْتَنِبُونَ كَبَـٰٓئِرَ ٱلْإِثْمِ وَٱلْفَوَٰحِشَ إِلَّا ٱللَّمَمَ ۚ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ وَٰسِعُ ٱلْمَغْفِرَةِ ۚ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِكُمْ إِذْ أَنشَأَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ وَإِذْ أَنتُمْ أَجِنَّةٌ فِى بُطُونِ أُمَّهَـٰتِكُمْ ۖ فَلَا تُزَكُّوٓا۟ أَنفُسَكُمْ ۖ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَنِ ٱتَّقَىٰٓ
ayahs.transliteration: Allatheena yajtaniboona kabaira alithmi waalfawahisha illa allamama inna rabbaka wasiAAu almaghfirati huwa aAAlamu bikum ith anshaakum mina alardi waith antum ajinnatun fee butooni ommahatikum fala tuzakkoo anfusakum huwa aAAlamu bimani ittaqa

translations.en_sahih: Those who avoid the major sins and immoralities, only [committing] slight ones. Indeed, your Lord is vast in forgiveness. He was most knowing of you when He produced you from the earth and when you were fetuses in the wombs of your mothers. So do not claim yourselves to be pure; He is most knowing of who fears Him.
translations.en_yusufali: Those who avoid great sins and shameful deeds, only (falling into) small faults,- verily thy Lord is ample in forgiveness. He knows you well when He brings you out of the earth, And when ye are hidden in your mothers' wombs. Therefore justify not yourselves: He knows best who it is that guards against evil.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Iaitu) orang-orang yang menjauhi dosa-dosa besar serta perbuatan-perbuatan yang keji, kecuali salah silap yang kecil-kecil (yang mereka terlanjur melakukannya, maka itu dimaafkan). Sesungguhnya Tuhanmu Maha Luas keampunanNya. Ia lebih mengetahui akan keadaan kamu semenjak Ia mencipta kamu (berasal) dari tanah, dan semasa kamu berupa anak yang sedang melalui berbagai peringkat kejadian dalam perut ibu kamu; maka janganlah kamu memuji-muji diri kamu (bahawa kamu suci bersih dari dosa). Dia lah sahaja yang lebih mengetahui akan orang-orang yang bertaqwa.

translations.en_sahih: Have you seen the one who turned away
translations.en_yusufali: Seest thou one who turns back,
translations.ms_basmeih: Adakah engkau mengetahui (keburukan) orang yang berpaling (dari menurut kebenaran kerana ia dihasut)?

translations.en_sahih: And gave a little and [then] refrained?
translations.en_yusufali: Gives a little, then hardens (his heart)?
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan setelah ia memberi sedikit pemberiannya, ia memutuskannya (kerana menurut hawa nafsunya)?

translations.en_sahih: Does he have knowledge of the unseen, so he sees?
translations.en_yusufali: What! Has he knowledge of the Unseen so that he can see?
translations.ms_basmeih: Adakah ia mempunyai pengetahuan mengenai perkara yang ghaib sehingga ia dapat mengetahui (bahawa orang lain boleh menghalang gantinya dari apa yang akan menimpanya pada hari akhirat)?

ayahs.arabic: أَمْ لَمْ يُنَبَّأْ بِمَا فِى صُحُفِ مُوسَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Am lam yunabba bima fee suhufi moosa

translations.en_sahih: Or has he not been informed of what was in the scriptures of Moses
translations.en_yusufali: Nay, is he not acquainted with what is in the Books of Moses-
translations.ms_basmeih: Atau belumkah ia diberitahu akan apa yang terkandung dalam Kitab-kitab Nabi Musa -

translations.en_sahih: And [of] Abraham, who fulfilled [his obligations] -
translations.en_yusufali: And of Abraham who fulfilled his engagements?-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan juga (dalam Kitab-kitab) Nabi Ibrahim yang memenuhi dengan sempurnanya (segala yang diperintahkan kepadanya)?

translations.en_sahih: That no bearer of burdens will bear the burden of another
translations.en_yusufali: Namely, that no bearer of burdens can bear the burden of another;
translations.ms_basmeih: (Dalam Kitab-kitab itu ditegaskan): Bahawa sesungguhnya seseorang yang boleh memikul tidak akan memikul dosa perbuatan orang lain (bahkan dosa usahanya sahaja);

ayahs.arabic: وَأَن لَّيْسَ لِلْإِنسَـٰنِ إِلَّا مَا سَعَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Waan laysa lilinsani illa ma saAAa

translations.en_sahih: And that there is not for man except that [good] for which he strives
translations.en_yusufali: That man can have nothing but what he strives for;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan bahawa sesungguhnya tidak ada (balasan) bagi seseorang melainkan (balasan) apa yang diusahakannya;

translations.en_sahih: And that his effort is going to be seen -
translations.en_yusufali: That (the fruit of) his striving will soon come in sight:
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan bahawa sesungguhnya usahanya itu akan diperlihatkan (kepadanya, pada hari kiamat kelak);

translations.en_sahih: Then he will be recompensed for it with the fullest recompense
translations.en_yusufali: Then will he be rewarded with a reward complete;
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian usahanya itu akan dibalas dengan balasan yang amat sempurna;

translations.en_sahih: And that to your Lord is the finality
translations.en_yusufali: That to thy Lord is the final Goal;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan bahawa sesungguhnya kepada hukum Tuhanmu lah kesudahan (segala perkara);

translations.en_sahih: And that it is He who makes [one] laugh and weep
translations.en_yusufali: That it is He Who granteth Laughter and Tears;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan bahawa sesungguhnya, Dia lah yang menyebabkan (seseorang itu bergembira) tertawa, dan menyebabkan (seseorang itu berdukacita) menangis;

translations.en_sahih: And that it is He who causes death and gives life
translations.en_yusufali: That it is He Who granteth Death and Life;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan bahawa sesungguhnya, Dia lah yang mematikan dan menghidupkan;

translations.en_sahih: And that He creates the two mates - the male and female -
translations.en_yusufali: That He did create in pairs,- male and female,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan bahawa sesungguhnya, Dia lah yang menciptakan pasangan - lelaki dan perempuan, -

translations.en_sahih: From a sperm-drop when it is emitted
translations.en_yusufali: From a seed when lodged (in its place);
translations.ms_basmeih: Dari (setitis) air mani ketika dipancarkan (ke dalam rahim);

translations.en_sahih: And that [incumbent] upon Him is the next creation
translations.en_yusufali: That He hath promised a Second Creation (Raising of the Dead);
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan bahawa sesungguhnya, Dia lah yang tetap menghidupkan semula (makhluk-makhluk yang mati);

translations.en_sahih: And that it is He who enriches and suffices
translations.en_yusufali: That it is He Who giveth wealth and satisfaction;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan bahawa sesungguhnya, Dia lah yang memberikan (sesiapa yang dikehendakiNya) apa yang diperlukannya dan memberikannya tambahan yang boleh disimpan;

translations.en_sahih: And that it is He who is the Lord of Sirius
translations.en_yusufali: That He is the Lord of Sirius (the Mighty Star);
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan bahawa sesungguhnya, Dia lah Tuhan (Pencipta) "Bintang Syikra;

translations.en_sahih: And that He destroyed the first [people of] 'Aad
translations.en_yusufali: And that it is He Who destroyed the (powerful) ancient 'Ad (people),
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan bahawa sesungguhnya, Dia lah yang membinasakan kaum "Aad" yang pertama (kaum Nabi Hud), -

translations.en_sahih: And Thamud - and He did not spare [them] -
translations.en_yusufali: And the Thamud nor gave them a lease of perpetual life.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan kaum "Thamud" (kaum Nabi Soleh). Maka tidak ada seorangpun (dari kedua-dua kaum itu) yang dibiarkan hidup.

ayahs.arabic: وَقَوْمَ نُوحٍ مِّن قَبْلُ ۖ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ هُمْ أَظْلَمَ وَأَطْغَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Waqawma noohin min qablu innahum kanoo hum athlama waatgha

translations.en_sahih: And the people of Noah before. Indeed, it was they who were [even] more unjust and oppressing.
translations.en_yusufali: And before them, the people of Noah, for that they were (all) most unjust and most insolent transgressors,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan kaum Nabi Nuh sebelum itu (telah juga dibinasakan). Sesungguhnya mereka adalah orang-orang yang sangat zalim dan sangat melampaui batas.

translations.en_sahih: And the overturned towns He hurled down
translations.en_yusufali: And He destroyed the Overthrown Cities (of Sodom and Gomorrah).
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan bandar-bandar yang ditunggang balikkan itu, Dia lah yang (mengangkatnya ke angkasa dan) menghempaskannya ke bumi;

translations.en_sahih: And covered them by that which He covered.
translations.en_yusufali: So that (ruins unknown) have covered them up.
translations.ms_basmeih: Lalu (penduduk) bandar-bandar itu diliputi azab seksa yang meliputinya.

translations.en_sahih: Then which of the favors of your Lord do you doubt?
translations.en_yusufali: Then which of the gifts of thy Lord, (O man,) wilt thou dispute about?
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka yang mana satu di antara nikmat-nikmat Tuhanmu (yang tidak terhingga itu) engkau ragu-ragukan (wahai manusia)?

translations.en_sahih: This [Prophet] is a warner like the former warners.
translations.en_yusufali: This is a Warner, of the (series of) Warners of old!
translations.ms_basmeih: (Al-Quran) ini adalah pemberi amaran di antara jenis-jenis amaran yang telah lalu!

translations.en_sahih: The Approaching Day has approached.
translations.en_yusufali: The (Judgment) ever approaching draws nigh:
translations.ms_basmeih: Telah hampir masa datangnya saat yang dekat itu (hari kiamat);

ayahs.arabic: لَيْسَ لَهَا مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ كَاشِفَةٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Laysa laha min dooni Allahi kashifatun

translations.en_sahih: Of it, [from those] besides Allah, there is no remover.
translations.en_yusufali: No (soul) but Allah can lay it bare.
translations.ms_basmeih: Tidak ada sesiapapun selain Allah yang dapat menahan atau menghapuskan huru-hara "hari kiamat" itu.

translations.en_sahih: Then at this statement do you wonder?
translations.en_yusufali: Do ye then wonder at this recital?
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka patutkah kamu merasa hairan terhadap keterangan-keterangan Al-Quran ini (sehingga kamu mengingkarinya)?

translations.en_sahih: And you laugh and do not weep
translations.en_yusufali: And will ye laugh and not weep,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Serta kamu tertawa (mengejek-ejeknya), dan kamu tidak mahu menangis (menyesali kesalahan kamu serta takutkan balasan buruk yang akan menimpa kamu)?

translations.en_sahih: While you are proudly sporting?
translations.en_yusufali: Wasting your time in vanities?
translations.ms_basmeih: Sedang kamu adalah orang-orang yang sombong angkuh, lagi yang melalaikan kewajipan?

translations.en_sahih: So prostrate to Allah and worship [Him].
translations.en_yusufali: But fall ye down in prostration to Allah, and adore (Him)!
translations.ms_basmeih: Oleh yang demikian, hendaklah kamu sujud kepada Allah (yang telah menurunkan Al-Quran itu), dan beribadatlah kamu kepadaNya (dengan sepenuh-penuh tauhid).
